name: Behind the mask
description:
𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐲—𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐫𝐢𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐟𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐲 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐥𝐞𝐟𝐭.

🄿 🅁 🄴 🄼 🄸 🅂 🄴

The estate thrums with preparations for your birthday. To the world, you are the son of Lady Anastasia, marked by the mask you wear to hide a childhood scar. Whispers say otherwise—that you are no true son at all, but a burden she was forced to raise.

In Iria, blood and rumor cut deeper than steel. With noble houses circling the empty throne, your existence is both weapon and curse. To some, you are proof of scandal. To others, you are a pawn worth marrying. And to Anastasia—the woman who raised you with a cruel hand—you are a reminder of everything she despises, yet cannot cast away.

Soon, the banquet that honors your birth may decide your fate.

🅂 🄴 🅃 🅃 🄸 🄽 🄶

Lore: — A fantasy world set in a Victorian-era like setting. Where magic meets technology.

Setting: — At the southern continent, Iria shares a border with Sutharia (Elves) to the north and the Wildlands to the east.

Location: — Verlaine City; the capital of Iria, a city of wealth, tradition, and magic.

🄰 🄻 🄱 🅄 🄼

Extra images both sfw and nsfw on links below.

⤷ 🅲🅸🆅🅸🆃

⤷ 🅳🅸🆂🅲🅾🆁🅳

🅆 🄰 🅁 🄽 🄸 🄽 🄶

This story contains themes of emotional and physical abuse, toxic family relationships and manipulation. Reader discretion is advised.

🄽 🄾 🅃 🄴 🅂

This is the same user in Beauty and the Beast. There's no need to play that one to understand this—you can consider it as a stand-alone if you wish.

—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—

𝐈 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐝 𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐝𝐞𝐞𝐩𝐬𝐞𝐞𝐤 𝐚𝐬 𝐢𝐭 𝐢𝐬 𝐟𝐚𝐫 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐣𝐥𝐥𝐦.

𝐭𝐮𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐬: 𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐧 𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐦𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐝.

—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—

𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐠𝐮𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐈 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐤 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐩𝐟𝐮𝐥!

⤷ɴɪᴄʜᴏʟᴀꜱᴄꜱ' ʙᴏᴛᴍᴀᴋɪɴɢ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇ

⤷ɪᴏʀᴠᴇᴛʜ'ꜱ ᴛʀᴏᴜʙʟᴇꜱʜᴏᴏᴛɪɴɢ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇ

⤷ᴋᴏʟᴀᴄʜ3'ꜱ ʟɪꜱᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴘʀᴏᴍᴘᴛꜱ ꜰᴏʀ ᴊʟʟᴍ

—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—

ᴀʟʟ ᴏᴘɪɴɪᴏɴᴀᴛᴇᴅ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴏʀ ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴀɪɴᴛꜱ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ʟʟᴍ ᴄᴀᴜꜱᴇꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ɪɢɴᴏʀᴇᴅ ᴏʀ ʀᴇᴍᴏᴠᴇᴅ.

ɪ ʀᴇꜱᴇʀᴠᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ʀɪɢʜᴛ ᴛᴏ ʙʟᴏᴄᴋ ᴜꜱᴇʀꜱ ᴡʜᴏ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴇɴᴛ ᴀɴʏᴛʜɪɴɢ ʙʟᴀᴛᴀɴᴛʟʏ ᴅɪꜱʀᴇꜱᴘᴇᴄᴛꜰᴜʟ/ᴅɪꜱᴛᴀꜱᴛᴇꜰᴜʟ ᴀɴᴅ ʀᴇᴍᴏᴠᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ꜱᴀɪᴅ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴇɴᴛ.

—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—·—
